title: DNA extraction (BOMB)
steps: Add 200 µL of 1mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Add 200 µL of 0.5mm beads to 1.5ml enppendorf tube
Add 225 µL of TE buffer to 2ml enppendorf tube TE buffer is in 4°C fridge
Add 375 µL of lysis buffer to 2ml enppendorf tube Lysis buffer is in 4°C fridge
Collect 10-20 mg of sample to 2ml enppendorf tube
Put 2ml eppendorf tube in mixmill for sample crush, at this condition: 30 rpm/s, for 4mins 00:04:00
Put 2ml eppendorf tube in centrifuge for centrifugation, at this condition: 17.0 x g, 25 °C, 3 minutes
Add 350 µL of isopropanol to the 1st well of 96 well plate
Add 125 µL of magnetic beads (10 mg/ml) to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate Shake the bottle and pipetting before using magnetic beads
Add 200 µL of the sample (lysate) from the 2ml centrifuged tube to the 1st well of 96 deep well plate USUALLY ADD at LAST
Add 400 µL of isopropanol to the 2nd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol to the 3rd well of 96 deep well plate
Add 300 µL of 80% enthanol to the 4th well of 96 deep well plate
Add 100 µL of DD water to the 5th well of 96 deep well plate
Put the prepared 96 deep well plate in the automated DNA extraction machine
Add 267 µL of 10M ammonium acetate to 2ml enppendorf tube 10M ammonium acetate is in 4°C fridge
After the extraction is done, collect 100 µL of the eluted sample as the DNA template for downstream experiments
creator: Yin-Tse Huang
